headline: “Municipal Bonds Belong in Taxable Accounts,” Say Charles Schwab Investment Experts
summary: The yield on a bond is only half the story. What lands in your bank account after taxes is the half that matters, and for high earners, that distinction can flip the math on what looks like the better investment. On a recent episode of Charles Schwab’s On Investing podcast titled “Rising Yields Highlight Muni ... “Municipal Bonds Belong in Taxable Accounts,” Say Charles Schwab Investment Experts

headline: Charles Schwab Foundation Launches Schwab Moneywise Momentum Grants as Part of a $20 Million Multi-Year Commitment to Financial Education
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, May 27, 2026--Charles Schwab Foundation announced an open call for nonprofit organizations to apply for Schwab Moneywise Momentum Grants, a new annual grant program designed to support fresh thinking and creative solutions that help people build financial knowledge and confidence to make informed money decisions.
